pages.notFound.title: Page Not Found
pages.project.progress.loadingHint: Fetching the freshest status from the studio...
pages.project.progress.subTitle: We line up your track, warm up the models, separate the audio, and package the results for whatever comes next.
pages.project.progress.steps.queue.label: Lining up
pages.project.progress.steps.queue.descr: We reserve compute for your project and line it up for processing.
pages.project.progress.steps.warmup.desc: Models warm up and align to your audio so the separation starts cleanly.
Audio is being analysed, split into stems, and prepared for new skills like transcription.
pages.project.progress.steps.delivery.de: We package the outputs so you can preview, download, and keep working.
pages.project.progress.insights.nowDescr: Hold tight while the audio engine peels apart layers and polishes them.
pages.project.progress.insights.futureDe: This flow also powers upcoming steps like recognition and artwork, so waiting now unlocks more later.
pages.project.progress.insights.controlD: Jump back home whenever you want; we'll keep your place and let you return to the results instantly.
pages.project.finish.title: Separation wrapped for {{name}}
pages.project.finish.subtitle: We stitched the stems and tuned levels so playback feels instant.
pages.project.finish.detail: Preparing downloads, previews, and the studio view.
pages.project.finish.stagesHint: Enjoy the glow for a moment while we open your interactive view.
